content:
---

Tap below this line, press the 📎 icon, and record your answer.

---

5. Checking Eligibility ✅

Is the total value of the estate’s bank accounts and other non-exempt property under $75,000? (Or, has it been more than two years since they passed away?)


---

Tap below this line, press the 📎 icon, and record your answer.

---

6. Exempt Property 🚗 🏠

Please state the year, make, and model of any vehicles. Also, please mention if they owned their primary home (their homestead).


---

Tap below this line, press the 📎 icon, and record your answer.

---

7. Other Assets 💰

Now, for all other assets like bank accounts or financial accounts, please state the name of the bank and the estimated value of the account.


---
context: From document: Probate Paperwork Interview — chunk 3 (chunk 3/5)
